Resolves #15284

Refs #13015

The census's second leaf: the substrate was fail-closed but fail-SILENT — `gridAdapterState`/`streamAdapterState` always knew why the cockpit degraded, and no surface said it. That silence was a large share of the lived 'FM is not functional' verdict. Now the shell says it, in one line, only when something is actually wrong.

**What ships:**

- **`spineBanner.mjs`** — the pure per-SPINE derivation (a sibling of the other pure fleet modules): `sample` (cold — the spine is unreachable) beats `stale` (reachable but degraded) beats `live`. Cold names the cause AND the one-command remedy (`npm run cockpit`, composing with the #15288 boot-seam sibling); degraded names the honest data state; **a fully live spine renders NOTHING** — zero nominal pixels, the exception-based discipline applied to chrome.
- **One toolbar slot** (`fleet-spine-banner`, `role: 'status'` for polite announcement), synced from EVERY `loadRoster`/`loadActivity` exit — including the no-bridge guard returns, because absence IS the cold truth.
- **Render-only over existing truth:** the routing matrices stay the sole state writers; this leaf adds zero probes, zero transports; the fail-closed behavior is byte-unchanged.
- **Boundary honored:** per-SPINE truth only — per-AGENT truth (wake/throttle) is #15273's surface.

Evidence: L2 (the full derivation matrix + slot-sync seam unit-pinned) → L2 required (the aggregation ACs). Residual: the live server-death→banner→recovery transition ride-along is observable only against a running fleet server — carried in Post-Merge Validation.

## Deltas from ticket

The ticket's 'transitions clear on recovery without a reload' AC is delivered structurally (the sync runs on every load exit, and the loads re-poll), but the live-transition WITNESS is the post-merge row — a unit fake cannot honestly model the server dying mid-session. Design sign-off (Grace, per the #15242 pattern) applies at review; the banner composes existing chrome classes + two kind-scoped cls hooks (`fm-spine-banner-cold`/`-degraded`) with zero literal styling in this leaf.

## Test Evidence

- `CI=1 npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/apps/agentos/view/fleet/` → **180/180** (exit-checked): the new `spineBanner.spec.mjs` (the full 3×3 derivation matrix with precedence + cause/remedy/zero-pixel pins) + every existing suite green.
- Three load-routing fakes gained the REAL `syncSpineBanner` (their null `getReference` makes it a guarded no-op — production code through the fakes, no stub drift).
- Two-window pop-out e2e re-run green (13.8s) — the toolbar/build path change regresses nothing.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [ ] Live transition ride-along: boot via `npm run cockpit`, kill the fleet server → the banner appears without a reload; restart it → the banner clears on the next poll.
- [ ] Grace's design pass on the two kind classes (token-level styling rides her SSOT pen if the default chrome needs more).

## Commits

- the single commit — pure module + slot + sync wiring + witnesses
